name: Test databao build with SQLite
description: Initialize a project with SQLite and build it, then compare results with expected introspection.
descriptionHtml: Initialize a project with SQLite and build it, then compare results with expected introspection.

testStage.description: Initialize a project with SQLite and build it, then compare results with expected introspection.

steps.name: Answering prompt ''What type of datasource do you want to add\?'' with ''sqlite''

parameters.value: 'What type of datasource do you want to add\?'
